pull.title: [None][fix] Add SPDX Apache-2.0 headers to auto_deploy test files
pull.body:
Add SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 headers to 95 test files under tests/unittest/auto_deploy/ and 2 YAML config files under tensorrt_llm/_torch/auto_deploy/config/ that were missing them.

These files are copied to the standalone llmc repo (NVIDIA/llm-compiler) by create_standalone_package.py, so fixing them at the source ensures the standalone repo passes OSRB license compliance review.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Chores**
  * Added Apache 2.0 license headers to configuration files and test modules for compliance.

* **Tests**
  * Added test utilities for tensor comparison, parameter reset, and hardware capability detection.
  * Added new test suites for multi-GPU model builds, custom operations (attention, convolution, MoE), and graph transformations.
  * Added smoke tests validating end-to-end auto-deploy workflows with various model architectures.

<!-- review_stack_entry_start -->

[![Review Change Stack](https://storage.googleapis.com/coderabbit_public_assets/review-stack-in-coderabbit-ui.svg)](https://app.coderabbit.ai/change-stack/NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM/pull/14193)

<!-- review_stack_entry_end -->
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

repo.name: TensorRT-LLM
repo.description: TensorRT LLM provides users with an easy-to-use Python API to define Large Language Models (LLMs) and supports state-of-the-art optimizations to perform inference efficiently on NVIDIA GPUs. TensorRT LLM also contains components to create Python and C++ runtimes that orchestrate the inference execution in a performant way.
